contentBriefs.title: AI Pet Simulation Content Strategy
contentBriefs.summary: Rogers Pets and Pet Simulated World are leading the AI-generated pet niche. Focus on 'I got a fictional pet' format with simulation elements.
contentBriefs.hook: I just adopted a pet that doesn't exist in real life... and it's growing faster than I expected

contentBriefs.title: AI Creature Design Video
contentBriefs.summary: Creature Lab shows AI creature generation is trending. Document the process of creating unique creatures with AI tools.
contentBriefs.hook: I used AI to create a creature that could never exist... then I brought it to life

contentBriefs.title: Night Toons Style Animation
contentBriefs.summary: Night Toons combines animation with storytelling. Create animated shorts with unexpected twists.
contentBriefs.hook: This 2-minute animation has a twist that changes everything

contentBriefs.title: Sacred Mystery Unboxing
contentBriefs.summary: Sacred Stuff curates mystery content. Create high-stakes unboxing with unknown value items.
contentBriefs.hook: I paid $500 for a mystery box from the dark web...

contentBriefs.title: Wild Pokédex AI Twist
contentBriefs.summary: Wild Pokédex combines Pokémon with AI. Create realistic Pokémon scenarios using AI generation.
contentBriefs.hook: What if Pokémon were real? I used AI to find out

contentBriefs.title: Triple Threat Viral Video - AI Creature Evolution
contentBriefs.summary: Synthesize all three proven viral patterns: time compression, thief-bait with educational payoff, and escalating stakes comparison. The '1000 Days' format with AI creature evolution using tiered tool investment.
contentBriefs.hook: I Survived 100 Days with a $10,000 AI Creature (It Escaped)
outline: Hook (0-30s): Thief-bait opening - creature has 'escaped' the simulation
Setup (30s-2min): Explain challenge - 100 days of evolution with escalating tool investment
Time Compression (2-10min): Day-by-day evolution highlights with clear progression
Price Comparison Integration: Tool upgrades at day 25, 50, 75, 100
Payoff (12-15min): Educational breakdown of what made the creature 'successful'

trendAnalysis.instructions: Use viewstats.com Pro Tools > Outlier to research each competitor channel. Look for videos with outlier scores >2.0x. Document: title, views, outlier score, why it performed well, content angle for your channel.
targetPatterns: I got a fictional pet simulation

steps: 4. Set date range to last 90 days
